scripts.build:win: npm run build --prefix ./client && xcopy client\dist server\static /E /I /Y
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix ./client && npm install --prefix ./server
scripts.heroku-postbuild: npm install --include=dev --prefix ./client && npm run build --prefix ./client && mkdir -p ./server/static && cp -r ./client/dist/* ./server/static/ && npm install --include=dev --prefix ./server
